### Description

Replace this paragraph with a description of your changes and rationale. Provide
links to an existing issue or external references/discussions, if appropriate.

### Testing

How is this change tested? List commands, previews, simulator checks, or manual
QA performed.

### Compatibility and Risk

What is the impact of this change on existing users? Call out private
API/runtime behavior, rendering limitations, or platform compatibility concerns.

### Checklist

- [ ] I have followed the coding style of the rest of the project.
- [ ] I have added tests or manual verification covering the changed behavior, if appropriate.
- [ ] I have updated documentation if necessary.
- [ ] Runtime behavior degrades without crashing when platform hooks are unavailable.
